g.text: Phase 1: User stories per feature (batch=5, delay=5s)
Phase 2: Acceptance + failure criteria per story
Phase 3: INVEST scores per story (dims clamped 1-5)
Calls 3..N: tasks per story chunk (CHUNK_SIZE=5, delay=5s)
Sort tasks: critical=0, high=1, medium=2, low=3
Generate code for up to 30 files
